name: Crockpot Boston Brown Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine corn meal, rye flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add wheat flour to the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, stir molasses into sour milk or buttermilk.
4. Gradually add the molasses mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring just enough to blend.
5. Add raisins to the mixture.
6. Spoon the batter into two one-pound coffee cans and cover with foil. Tie securely.
7. Place the cans on a metal rack in the bottom of the slow cooker and pour 2 cups of hot water around them.
8. Cover the pot and cook on high for 2 1/2 to 3 hours.
9. Remove the cans from the pot and let stand for 5 to 10 minutes.
10. Turn the bread out onto a cooling rack.
